# C/C++ (FFI)

C-compatible FFI bindings for tree-sitter-language-pack. Use from any language with C interop.

## Installation

Build from source as part of the [tree-sitter-language-pack](https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack) workspace.

## Quick Start

```c
#include "ts_pack.h"

int main() {
    TsPackRegistry *reg = ts_pack_registry_new();

    size_t count = ts_pack_language_count(reg);
    printf("Available languages: %zu\n", count);

    const TSLanguage *lang = ts_pack_get_language(reg, "python");
    if (lang) {
        printf("Loaded python!\n");
    }

    ts_pack_registry_free(reg);
    return 0;
}
```

## API Reference

For detailed API documentation, see the [C/C++ (FFI) package](https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack/tree/main/crates/ts-pack-ffi).
